title: AgentLoop .agentloop/tasks.yaml
description: Editor/doctor validation for the task-graph SSOT. The runtime parser (dag.load) stays the behavioral truth — when you change it, update this schema in the same commit. dag.py additionally validates what a schema cannot (cycles, unknown blockedBy targets, duplicate ids).

test.description: The task's own test command — /build runs it as the focused first gate step when it differs from the configured quality_gate.steps.

req.description: Requirement ids this task covers: R-N / NFR-N, comma/space-separated.
